title: Twenty-six new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta May 21-23
summary: On May 21, YKHC reports nineteen new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. New COVID-19 Cases The 19 are residents in: Aniak (1) Anvik (1) Bethel (4) Grayling (2) Holy Cross (1) Kalskag (1) Kasigluk (1) Nunapitchuk (5) St. Mary’s (1) Tununak (2) — On May 22, YKHC reports four new cases of COVID-19 in t...

title: University, partners deploy carbon dioxide-sensing underwater glider
summary: Alaska has a new tool for tracking ocean acidification — a 7-foot-long, bright pink Seaglider. The University of Alaska Fairbanks and its commercial partners are the first U.S. team to measure carbon dioxide, the driving factor in ocean acidification, with an unoccupied underwater vehicle. Globally, the pH of the ocean is decreasing as humans burn coal, oil and gas. When carbon dioxide from these activities is absorbed by the ocean, it affects the ability of marine organisms to build and maintain their shells and may also change the behavior o...
